markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between GrowthX and AppBroda for content strategy and growth](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AppBroda is expanding into a new MarTech product vertical, targeting UA managers across gaming and consumer apps](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation services, focusing on editorial and programmatic content to drive SEO and broader content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [AppBroda is not ready to invest in GrowthX's services ($9K/month) due to bootstrapped nature and pre-product market fit stage](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)

## Topics

### AppBroda's Business Overview

  - [4-year-old bootstrapped adtech company with 20 employees](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Primary business: ad serving for mobile gaming publishers (e.g., Zynga, Voodoo)](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [High ACV ($20K-$300K), serving \~60 clients out of 400-500 potential companies](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Geographic spread: 40% Europe, 30% China, rest in US and Southeast Asia](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### New Product Vertical

  - [Developing MarTech tools for user acquisition optimization](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Target: UA managers and creative ops teams in gaming, consumer apps, and D2C brands](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Focus: Productivity and workflow improvements for UA processes](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Potential market: \~20,000 companies, lower ACV than current business](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [AI-powered content creation service with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Two main content types: Editorial (long-form, point of view) and Programmatic (template-based, repeatable)](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [12-week initial engagement process, including strategy development and content calibration](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Pricing: Starts at $9K/month with 12-month engagements (90-day pilot period)](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)

### Content Strategy and Impact

  - [Primary focus on SEO, but aims for broader content strategy impact](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
  - [Additional channels: Social media, interview-based content (e.g., customer stories)](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Case studies: Abnormal Security (1300+ content assignments), Tiro (new blog growth)](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)

### AppBroda's Current Needs

  - [Recognizes importance of content strategy for new product launch](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
  - [Not ready for significant SEO investment due to pre-product market fit stage](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
  - [Limited resources to dedicate to content management and strategy currently](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ashish to bookmark the conversation and revisit when AppBroda is ready to focus on SEO and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=2027.0)
  - [Kyle emphasized the importance of not waiting too long to invest in organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)
  - [Potential future reconnection initiated by AppBroda when timing is right](https://fathom.video/share/68-Tssi9R7p5oNuLEmLpCBNVdnWk8mcg?tab=summary&timestamp=2127.0)
